submission: GOLDEN SUNFLOWERS — JEPA + Universal Transformer + PhiNTA

phd_monograph.asha_threshold: INV-2 (golden, phi-weight 1.0): T_ASHA = phi^2 + phi^-2 + phi^-4 approximately 3.146; filed conservative upper bound 3.5
phd_monograph.sanctioned_seeds_provenance: Ch.5 balancing_function B(x) = (x + 1/x)/2, unique positive fixed point at phi
phd_monograph.champion_config_reference: Ch.21: lr=0.004, GF16 PHI_BIAS=60, seed triple (1597, 2584, 4181), mean BPB=1.830

phd_ablation_coverage.comment: PhD Ch.17 runs 2^7=128 factorial over factors A..G; this PR covers 3 of 7 factors explicitly.
phd_ablation_coverage.factor_a_ternary_weights: out of scope (FP16/bf16 only in parameter-golf baseline)
phd_ablation_coverage.factor_b_phi_attention: out of scope (QK-gain inherited from baseline)
phd_ablation_coverage.factor_e_mxfp4: out of scope (int6 GPTQ from baseline)

zenodo_provenance.note: Trinity Zenodo bundles B001..B013 use odd record numbers 19227865..19227889. The specific DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19227877 is B007 'VSA Operations for Ternary' (anchor for PhD Ch.30/Ch.31), NOT the trainer-igla codebase. CITATION.cff corrected accordingly.

constants.alpha_phi_representation_note: PhD Ch.4 proves both forms equal via alpha_phi_closed_form (Qed). PR #2 uses the algebraic form to match Issue #1742 numerical target 0.1181.
